meaning: 马拉巴尔海岸[印度西南部一沿海地区]
examples: A city of southwest India on the Malabar Coast southwest of Bangalore.
India and the US kicked off the Malabar naval exercise today and invited Japan to join them.
While hardly a household name, Malabar has a loyal following among such institutional investors as Northern Trust.
That Chicago-based bank and other private banks have been pouring money into his advisory company Malabar Capital Ltd.
